title: Global markets slide as oil and geopolitical risk rattle investors
summary: Major equity benchmarks fell across the US, Europe, and Asia as crude oil stayed elevated and uncertainty over the Middle East kept risk appetite weak. Bond yields climbed, pressuring rate-sensitive sectors, while safe-haven flows and energy costs remained in focus for households and businesses.
